findings.description: `PartInfo` is a PascalCase class used in the file upload code example (`PartInfo part = req.getPart("fileToSave").get(0);`) but is absent from s5 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `PartInfo part = req.getPart("fileToSave").get(0);` in the FileManagementUtilの使用例(ファイルアップロード時) section

findings.description: `Blob` is a PascalCase class used in the file download code example (`Blob blob = FileManagementUtil.find(fileId);`) but is absent from s5 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `Blob blob = FileManagementUtil.find(fileId);` in the FileManagementUtilの使用例(ダウンロード時) section
